title: Rate-limit Projection Model Implementation Plan
summary: Implementation plan for 5h/7d rate-limit end-of-window projection chips that learn from local usage history, with config, render, and metrics wiring.
notes: Implementation plan with architecture, file-level contracts, code snippets, and task steps -> SPEC (how it is built). Not an ADR (no Decision/Consequences status) nor PRD (no user stories/acceptance criteria). Confidence medium: 'plan' framing could be read as DOC, but dominant signals are technical build contracts.
